calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-16-2026 Continued To Jul-13-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-15-2026 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar May-22-2026 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference:
Sandra Duritza, Esq., of The advocates personal injury law, LLP., Tel: (858)999-8022 for plaintiff.
Damon Thurston, Esq., of RANKIN, SHUEY, MINTZ, LAMPASONA & HARPER, Tel: (510) 433-2600 for defendant SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY COLLEGE DISTRICT.
Court Reporter: Alisa James, CSR #10901; Phone: 510-917-0915, Email. Alille66@gmail.com.

Hearing held. A timely Notice of Contest was received from defendant's counsel regarding height differential between the concrete slabs measured and whether the crack contained jagged edges, whether the surrounding pavement created an irregular walking surface, whether lighting or visibility conditions affected perception of the defect, or whether the configuration of the sidewalk otherwise increased the risk of tripping. The matter was discussed on the record.The Court reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

San Francisco Community College District's Motion for Summary Judgment Taken Under Submission.

(As fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Court Reporter: Alisa James, CSR #10901; Phone: 510-917-0915, Email. Alille66@gmail.com. Reported (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing the Court signs ORDER DENYING DEFENDANT CITY COLLEGE OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.***

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-20-2025 Set For Trial On Jun-22-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-28-2025 Off Calendar
